name: seo-copywriter-skill
description: The SEO Copywriter Claude Code skill suite. For a content client, the agent plans the SEO/GEO strategy (seo-strategist), writes the articles, builds a brand-themed static content-hub website (mimicking the bundled reference demos, re-skinned per client), fetches fresh on-brand imagery from the Pexels API, and deploys it as its own standalone Vercel project. Self-contained — no app/database/console; bring your own Pexels key. Includes optional internal 'content engine' sub-skills (seo-assistant/seo-blog-writer/seo-audit) that require a separate web app and are not needed for the standalone workflow.
